name: Ocean Park Hong Kong
city: Wong Chuk Hang, Hong Kong Island
description: Ocean Park Hong Kong, commonly known simply as Ocean Park, is an animal theme park in Hong Kong.  Covering an area of 91. 5 ha in Wong Chuk Hang, it is the largest theme park by area in Hong Kong, and is also the city's second oldest theme park, after the now-defunct Lai Chi Kok Amusement Park.
